+1 to AC.description: Gain +1 to your AC through supernatural foresight
+1 to AC.name: +1 to AC

+1 use per day of Petrifying Gaze.name: +1 use per day of Petrifying Gaze

+1 XP for Secrets.description: +1 XP whenever you learn a valuable or significant secret (reroll duplicates)
+1 XP for Secrets.name: +1 XP for Secrets

5bpWuaT0KTNzuzCu.description: Choose one type of weapon, such as longswords. You gain +1 to attack and damage with that weapon type. In addition, add half your level to these rolls (round down).
5bpWuaT0KTNzuzCu.name: Weapon Mastery

7JTDRLtHc6FOrIEc.description: Add your Constitution modifier, if positive, to your gear slots.
7JTDRLtHc6FOrIEc.name: Hauler

Add Wisdom to Roll.description: 3/day, add your Wis bonus to any roll (reroll duplicates)

Additional Use of Charge.name: Additional Use of Charge

Additional Use of Smoke Step.name: Additional Use of Smoke Step

1/day, gain advantage on melee attacks for 3 rounds.

duplicate = +1 use per day

Ambitious.description: You gain one additional talent roll at 1st level.
Ambitious.name: Ambitious

Avoid Entrapment/Injury.description: You have advantage on Dexterity checks to avoid entrapment or injury
Avoid Entrapment/Injury.name: Avoid Entrapment/Injury

Az2fXCwgo5C3x2X7.description: Whenever you use a luck token, add [[/roll 1d6]] to the roll.
Az2fXCwgo5C3x2X7.name: Destined

Destined.description: Whenever you use a luck token, add 1d6 to the roll.

Bardic Arts.description: You're trained in oration, performing arts, lore, and diplomacy. You have advantage on related checks.
Bardic Arts.name: Bardic Arts

Basilisk Blood.description: You have ADV on CON checks to avoid harmful maladies, poisons, or afflictions.
Basilisk Blood.name: Basilisk Blood

Basilisk Egg.description: You find a @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.gear.Item.zU6dopKBk3pKS9F9]{Basilisk Egg}; a loyal baby hatches in [[/r 1d4]] days
Basilisk Egg.name: Basilisk Egg

Beginner's Luck.description: 0-level characters can wield all gear until 1st level.
Beginner's Luck.name: Beginner's Luck

Black Lotus.description:
You earned the right to eat a petal of the fabled black lotus flower, and you survived its sorcerous effects.

Roll one talent on the @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.rollable-tables.RollTable.pQAyZAcfrs9JrG0Q]{Black Lotus Talents} table. You may reroll duplicates or keep them.
Black Lotus.name: Black Lotus

BsRPGhKXYwJBI9ex.description: Choose one kind of armor. You get +1 AC from that armor
BsRPGhKXYwJBI9ex.name: Armor Mastery

Charge.description: 3/day, you can @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.class-abilities.Item.Ecajh7eY7lBEHuMv] into combat by moving at least near before attacking. Each time you do this, your melee attacks deal double damage that round.
Charge.name: Charge

Deity.description: Choose a god to serve who matches your alignment (see Deities, pg. 30). You have a holy symbol for your god (it takes up no gear slots).
Deity.name: Deity

Demonic Possession.description:
@UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.class-abilities.Item.dsFmHTTuERiQePky]{Demonic Possession}

3/day, gain a +1 bonus to your damage rolls that lasts 3 rounds. In addition, add half your level to the damage bonus (round down).
Demonic Possession.name: Demonic Possession

Demonic Possession Bonus.description: Your Demonic Possession bonus increases by 1 point.
Demonic Possession Bonus.name: Demonic Possession Bonus

Duality.description:
Choose two different @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.talents.Item.A8Siwy6S27LwEkx5]{Old Gods} effects each day

duplicate = reroll
Duality.name: Duality

Familiar.description:
You have a small animal such as a raven, rat, or frog who serves you loyally. It can speak Common.

Your familiar can be the source of spells you cast. Treat it as though it were you for determining spell ranges.

If your familiar dies, you can restore it to life by permanently sacrificing 1d4 hit points.
Familiar.name: Familiar

Farsight (Ranged).description: You get a +1 bonus to attack rolls with ranged weapons or a +1 bonus to spellcasting checks.
Farsight (Ranged).name: Farsight (Ranged)

Farsight (Spell).description: You get a +1 bonus to attack rolls with ranged weapons or a +1 bonus to spellcasting checks.
Farsight (Spell).name: Farsight (Spell)

Find a Random Priest or Wizard Wand.description: You find a random priest or wizard wand (you choose)
Find a Random Priest or Wizard Wand.name: Find a Random Priest or Wizard Wand

Flourish.description:
3/day, regain [[/r 1d6]] hit points when you hit an enemy with a melee attack.

@UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.class-abilities.Item.6snDwCm38HjvO1uv]{Flourish}
Flourish.name: Flourish

Force GM Reroll.description:
1/day, force the GM to reroll a single roll

duplicate = +1 use per day
Force GM Reroll.name: Force GM Reroll

Force Morale Check.description:
1/day, force a close being to check morale, even if immune

duplicate = +1 use per day

1/day, go @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.spell-effects.Item.sfeg7jRt0oW5qXO4]{berserk}: immune to damage for 3 rounds

duplicate = +1 use/day
Go Berserk.name: Go Berserk

Grit (Dexterity).description: Choose Strength or Dexterity. You have advantage on checks of that type to overcome an opposing force, such as kicking open a stuck door (Strength) or slipping free of rusty chains (Dexterity).
Grit (Dexterity).name: Grit (Dexterity)

Advantage Against Opposing Force.name: Advantage Against Opposing Force
Advantage Against Opposing Force.description: You have advantage on Dexterity checks to overcome an opposing force, such as slipping free of rusty chains, etc.

Grit (Strength).description: Choose Strength or Dexterity. You have advantage on checks of that type to overcome an opposing force, such as kicking open a stuck door (Strength) or slipping free of rusty chains (Dexterity).
Grit (Strength).name: Grit (Strength)

Advantage Against Opposing Force.name: Advantage Against Opposing Force
Advantage Against Opposing Force.description: You have advantage on Strength checks to overcome an opposing force, such as kicking open a stuck door, etc.

Herbalism.description:
Make an INT check to prepare an herbal remedy you choose. If you fail, you can't make that remedy again until you successfully rest. Unused remedies expire in 3 rounds.

DC | Effect

11 | @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.class-abilities.Item.UzSmg3aLstFcNsUa]{Salve}. Heals 1 HP

12 | @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.class-abilities.Item.EhaA5tBROfrws1Kx]{Stimulant}. You can't be surprised for 10 rounds

13 | @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.class-abilities.Item.i8PZF77jaVDkCE6n]{Foebane}. You get ADV on attacks and damage against one creature type you choose for [[/r 1d6]] rounds

14 | @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.class-abilities.Item.3fck7HFRfDywsjQk]{Restorative}. Ends one poison or disease

15 | @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.class-abilities.Item.Ussun0GbRMiJZ8vP]{Curative}. Equivalent to a @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.magic-items.jucTGEjsqJ1znHdf]{Potion of Healing}
Herbalism.name: Herbalism

Herbalism Check Advantage.description: You gain ADV on Herbalism checks for an herb you choose
Herbalism Check Advantage.name: Herbalism Check Advantage

1/day, choose a creature of LV 9 or less you can see; it must pass a [[check 15 wis]] check or it can't see or hear you for 1d4 rounds.

@UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.class-abilities.Item.KfaSyGxX13IBVmKO]{Hide from Creature}
Hide from Creature.name: Hide from Creature

1/day, hypnotize a LV 5 or less creature for 3 rounds

duplicate = additional use per day

@UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.class-abilities.Item.MbC7YucyY4D9dYre]{Ignore All Damage}
Ignore All Damage.name: Ignore All Damage

Implacable.name: Implacable

Your Presence effects become DC 9 to enact

duplicate = reroll
Improved Presence DC.name: Improved Presence DC

Increased Flourish Heal.description: Increase the HP you gain from Flourish by [[/r 1d6]]
Increased Flourish Heal.name: Increased Flourish Heal

KLDZKFY6SrqQKSva.description: If you hit a creature who is unaware of your attack, you deal an extra weapon die of damage. Add additional weapon dice of damage equal to half your level (round down).

Backstab.name: Backstab
Backstab.description: If you hit a creature who is unaware of your attack, you deal an extra weapon die of damage. Add additional weapon dice of damage equal to half your level (round down).

Knack (Luck).description: You begin each session with a luck token.
Knack (Luck).name: Knack (Luck)

Last stand.description: You get up from dying with 1 hit point on a natural d20 roll of 18-20.
Last stand.name: Last stand

Learn a Wizard Spell.description: Learn a wizard spell, tier = half your level. Cast it with INT
Learn a Wizard Spell.name: Learn a Wizard Spell

Learn Extra Spell.description: Learn one additional spell of any tier you know.
Learn Extra Spell.name: Learn Extra Spell

Learn Seer Spell.description: Learn one additional seer spell of any tier you know.
Learn Seer Spell.name: Learn Seer Spell

Learn Witch Spell.description: Learn an additional witch spell of any tier you can cast
Learn Witch Spell.name: Learn Witch Spell

Learn Wizard Spell.description: Learn one additional wizard spell of any tier you know.
Learn Wizard Spell.name: Learn Wizard Spell

Learning Spells.description:
Learning Spells. You can permanently learn a wizard spell from a spell scroll by studying it for a day and succeeding on a [[check 15 int]] check.

Whether you succeed or fail, you expend the spell scroll.

Spells you learn in this way don't count toward your known spells.
Learning Spells.name: Learning Spells

LR6h4lXVXwx7AFQ6.description: You have a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls with melee weapons.
LR6h4lXVXwx7AFQ6.name: Mighty

Mighty.name: Mighty
Mighty.description: You have a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls with melee weapons.

Magic Missile Advantage.description: Wizards always have advantage on casting Magic Missile.
Magic Missile Advantage.name: Magic Missile Advantage

Magic Resistance.description:
Hostile spells that target you are always hard to cast

duplicate = reroll
Magic Resistance.name: Magic Resistance

Magical Dabbler.description: You can activate spell scrolls and wands using Charisma as your spellcasting stat. If you critically fail, roll a wizard mishap.
Magical Dabbler.name: Magical Dabbler

Make a Random Magic Item.description: Make one random magic item. See Magic Items compendium.
Make a Random Magic Item.name: Make a Random Magic Item

Morale Checks at DC 18.description: When enemies who can see you make a morale check, the DC is 18 instead of 15
Morale Checks at DC 18.name: Morale Checks at DC 18

Mount.description:
You have a common camel or horse with a reliable or lovely demeanor (see pg. 29). It comes when you call and never spooks. You can only have one such mount at a time.

While riding your mount, you both get a bonus to AC equal to half your level (round down). Your mount has additional levels equal to half your level (round down). You can freely leap on or off your mount once per round.

If you lose your mount, you can use your downtime to acquire and train another. Pass a [[check 15 cha]] check for the new creature to become your mount. Lower the DC one step each attempt.
Mount.name: Mount

Old Gods.description:
Each day, your purpose aligns with one of the Old Gods. Choose one of the below options after you complete a rest; you gain its benefits until you complete your next rest.

  • Odin. You regain 1d4 HP every time you kill an enemy.

  • Freya. You gain a luck token if you don't have one. Each time you use a luck token, add 1d6 to your roll.

  • Loki. You have advantage on checks to lie, sneak, and hide.
Old Gods.name: Old Gods

Omen.description:
@UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.class-abilities.Item.pRO1kFMnFkkcYOgC]

3/day, you can make a [[check 9 wis]] check. On a success, gain a luck token (you can't have more than one luck token at a time).
Omen.name: Omen

Paralyze a Target.description:
1/day, paralyze a target of LV 9 or less you damage with a weapon for 1d4 rounds.

@UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.class-abilities.Item.vndvnruyp9aZ3f5l]{Paralyze a Target}
Paralyze a Target.name: Paralyze a Target

Patron.description: Choose a patron to serve (see pg. 17). Your patron is the source of your supernatural gifts. If your patron is displeased with you, it can withhold its gifts. You lose any talents granted by your Patron Boons during this time.
Patron.name: Patron

Patron Boon.description:
At 1st level, you gain a random Patron Boon talent (see pg. 18) based on your chosen patron.

Whenever you gain a new talent roll, you may choose to roll on your Patron Boon table rather than the Warlock Talents table.
Patron Boon.name: Patron Boon

Petrifying Gaze.description:
@UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.class-abilities.Item.Jkl9j4RZ2WYy0Gmd]{Petrifying Gaze}

One creature of your level or less that meets your gaze must pass a DC 15 CON check or be petrified for 1d4 rounds. It still takes damage as normal while petrified.

You can use this talent a number of times per day equal to your CON modifier (minimum 1).
Petrifying Gaze.name: Petrifying Gaze

Poisons Training.description:
You are trained in the use of poisons (see pg. 27)

duplicate = reroll
Poisons Training.name: Poisons Training

Presence.description:
Make a [[check 12 cha]] check to enact one of the following effects. If you fail (excluding focus), you can't use that effect again until you rest.

  • @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.class-abilities.Item.jg2sUC3nIAI8sT18]{Inspire} DC 12. One target in near gains a luck token.

  • @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.class-abilities.Item.oCNpE6bnZjPIdOO1]{Fascinate} (Focus). You transfix all chosen targets of level 4 or less within near
Presence.name: Presence

Prolific.description: Add 1d6 to your learning rolls. Groups carousing with 1 or more bards add 1d6 to their rolls.
Prolific.name: Prolific

quYUUqTTAX3QlAGa.description:
You gain +1 to your AC when wielding a melee weapon in each hand.

Note: Remember to toggle the +1 AC Dual Wield Active Effect on/off in the Effects tab of your character sheet when needed.
quYUUqTTAX3QlAGa.name: +1 AC Dual Wield

Read Mind of Creature.description:
1/day, read the mind of a creature you touch for 3 rounds

duplicate = +1 use per day
Read Mind of Creature.name: Read Mind of Creature

Relentless.description:
3/day, when you are reduced to 0 HP, make a [[check 18 con]] check (the Implacable talent applies to this roll). On a success, you instead go to 1 HP.

@UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.class-abilities.Item.z5uKTDf4wtkipQ4s]{Relentless}
Relentless.name: Relentless

Ride any Creature.description: You can use any rider-bearing creature as your mount.
Ride any Creature.name: Ride any Creature

Seafarer.description: You have advantage on checks related to navigating and crewing boats.
Seafarer.name: Seafarer

Shield Wall.description: If you wield a shield, you can use your action to take a defensive stance. Your AC becomes 20 during this time.
Shield Wall.name: Shield Wall

Sleep a Creature.description:
1/day, choose a living creature of LV 5 or less you can see within near; it must pass a [[check 15 con]] check or fall asleep.

@UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.class-abilities.Item.i0IHFrEbhd0MOvkQ]{Sleep a Creature}
Sleep a Creature.name: Sleep a Creature

Slime Form.description:
1/dary, turn into a crawling puddle of slime for 3 rounds

duplicate = +1 use per day
Slime Form.name: Slime Form

Smoke Step.description:
3/day, teleport to a location you can see within near. This does not use your action.

@UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.class-abilities.Item.yDByoMchtApfpKcS]{Smoke Step}
Smoke Step.name: Smoke Step

Spellcasting (Knight of St. Ydris).description:
You can cast witch spells you know.

Each time you gain a level, you choose new witch spells to learn according to the Witch Spells Known table.

You use your Charisma stat to cast witch spells. The DC is 10 + the spell's tier.

If you fail a spellcasting check, you can't cast that spell again until you complete a rest.

If you roll a natural 1 on a spellcasting check, you must also roll on the corresponding Diabolical Mishap table (see pg. 22) for the spell's tier
Spellcasting (Knight of St. Ydris).name: Spellcasting (Knight of St. Ydris)

Spellcasting (Priest).description:
Spellcasting. You can cast priest spells you know.

You know two tier 1 spells of your choice from the priest spell list on pg. 57.

Each time you gain a level, you choose new priest spells to learn according to the Priest Spells Known table.

For casting priest spells, see Spellcasting on pg. 52.
Spellcasting (Priest).name: Spellcasting (Priest)

Spellcasting (Seer).description:
You can cast seer spells you know. You know one tier 1 spell of your choice from the seer spell list (see pg. 30).

Each time you gain a level, you choose a new seer spell to learn according to the Seer Spells Known table.

You use your Wisdom stat to cast seer spells. The DC is 10 + the spell's tier.

If you fail a spellcasting check, you can't cast that spell again until you complete a rest. If you roll a natural 1 on a spellcasting check, you can't cast that spell again until you complete Seer Penance.

Seer Penance

Spell Tier 1: Temporarily give up 1d4 HP (you stay at 1 HP minimum); it returns in a week.

Spell Tier 2: Temporarily lower your WIS stat by 2 points; it returns in two weeks.

Spell Tier 3: Sacrifice 1 point of Charisma; it never returns.

Spell Tier 4: Ritualistically sink a burning longboat into the sea.

Spell Tier 5: Ritualistically sacrifice 9 humanoid lives.
Spellcasting (Seer).name: Spellcasting (Seer)

Spellcasting (Witch).description:
You can cast witch spells you know.

You know three tier 1 spells of your choice from the witch spell list (see pg. 24).

Each time you gain a level, you choose new witch spells to learn according to the Witch Spells Known table.

You use your Charisma stat to cast witch spells. The DC is 10 + the spell's tier.

If you fail a spellcasting check, you can't cast that spell again until you complete a rest.

If you roll a natural 1 on a spellcasting check, you must also roll on the corresponding Diabolical Mishap table for the spell's tier (see pg. 22).
Spellcasting (Witch).name: Spellcasting (Witch)

Spellcasting (Wizard).description:
Spellcasting. You can cast wizard spells you know.

You know three tier 1 spells of your choice from the wizard spell list (see pg. 57).

Each time you gain a level, you choose new wizard spells to learn according to the Wizard Spells Known table.

For casting wizard spells, see Spellcasting on pg. 52.
Spellcasting (Wizard).name: Spellcasting (Wizard)

Spellcasting Advantage.description: Gain advantage on casting one spell you know.
Spellcasting Advantage.name: Spellcasting Advantage

Stealthy.description:
Once per day, you can become invisible for 3 rounds.

@UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.conditions.Item.piycdXLudXTFLG0k]{Condition: Invisible (Stealthy)}
Stealthy.name: Stealthy

Stone Skin.description:
Add 2 + half your level (round down) to your AC if you are unarmored.

You have advantage on checks to hide in natural environments.
Stone Skin.name: Stone Skin

Stone Skin Advantage on Hide.name: Stone Skin Advantage on Hide
Stone Skin Advantage on Hide.description: You have advantage on checks to hide in natural environments.

Stout.description: Start with +2 HP. Roll your hit point gains with advantage.
Stout.name: Stout

Teleport.description:
1/day, teleport to a far location you see as your move.

duplicate = +1 use per day
Teleport.name: Teleport

Teleport to Familiar.description:
1/day, teleport to your familiar's location as a move

duplicate = +1 use per day

Class Ability: @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.class-abilities.Item.cXyvO6H22jfOxcz4]{Teleport to Familiar}
Teleport to Familiar.name: Teleport to Familiar

TiaXUSTLoJpjfyxD.description:
You are adept at thieving skills and have the necessary tools of the trade secreted on your person (they take up no gear slots).

You are trained in the following tasks and have advantage on any associated checks:

  • Climbing

  • Sneaking and hiding

  • Applying disguises

  • Finding and disabling traps

  • Delicate tasks such as picking pockets and opening locks
TiaXUSTLoJpjfyxD.name: Thievery

Thievery.name: Thievery
Thievery.description: You are trained in the following tasks and have advantage on any associated checks: Climbing, Sneaking and hiding, Applying disguises, Finding and disabling traps and delicate tasks such as picking pockets and opening locks.

Trained Assassin.description: You have advantage on checks to sneak and hide. Your attacks deal double damage against targets that are unaware of your presence.
Trained Assassin.name: Trained Assassin

Triple Damage Assassin.description: Your deal triple damage with your Trained Assassin talent.
Triple Damage Assassin.name: Triple Damage Assassin

Turn Undead.description: You know the turn undead spell. It doesn’t count toward your number of known spells.
Turn Undead.name: Turn Undead

Upgrade Destined Die.description: Increase the die category of your Destined talent by one.
Upgrade Destined Die.name: Upgrade Destined Die

UVsf7VJCOrBm42Yz.description: Gain advantage on initiative rolls (reroll if duplicate)
UVsf7VJCOrBm42Yz.name: Initiative Advantage

Walk on Sheer Surfaces.description:
1/day, you can walk on sheer surfaces like walls for 1d4 rds.

@UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.class-abilities.Item.1hc2HGy3pZ89jvGM]{Walk on Sheer Surfaces}
Walk on Sheer Surfaces.name: Walk on Sheer Surfaces

Walk on Water.description:
1/day, you can walk on water as if it were solid for 1d4 rds.

@UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.class-abilities.Item.xwE0DGzMTxMQWqRj]{Walk on Water}
Walk on Water.name: Walk on Water

Wayfinder.description:
You have advantage on checks associated with:

  • Navigation

  • Tracking

  • Bushcraft

  • Stealth

  • Wild animals
